description: CompositionBlack shorts made of 100% polyester with the lining made of 100% recycled polyester, is engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has an elasticated waist with drawcords, white stripe detailing along the length and nike swoosh printed on the left legFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry clean, bleach or lay on itself when wetTumble dry lowDo not ironDesigned for the man who never compromises on comfort and style, this short from nike is crafted from polyester fabric that is engineered with Dri-Fit technology to offer a flattering fit and sweat-free comfort. Add on sporty jerseys and sneakers.
